title: Connect Google Drive to Claude (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A guide demonstrating how to link Google Drive directly to Claude using connectors, enabling users to query and summarize files without repeated uploads or copy-pasting. The workflow simplifies data access by allowing Claude to work with real data stored in Google Drive.
